Should flag

Typography Anti-Patterns

This side mirrors the isolated flag page: Inter everywhere, one typographic voice, and a nearly flat type scale.

Overused Font

Inter is loaded and used as the primary family for the whole specimen.

Single Font

There is no contrasting display or supporting text face inside the specimen.

Flat Type Hierarchy

The sizes are 13px, 14px, 15px, 16px, and 18px, with no useful structural jump.

Caption text barely separates from body copy.

A Subheading

It is technically a heading, but visually it is just another line of text.

Should pass

Good Typography

This side mirrors the isolated pass page: a real font pairing, clear scale, and visible hierarchy.

Two Font Families

Newsreader carries display text, while Karla handles reading surfaces and supporting labels.

Strong Size Hierarchy

Sizes range from 12px to 48px with distinct roles for heading, subheading, body, and caption.

Caption text is intentionally smaller but still readable.
